description: Migrated a WordPress website to Next.js, increasing Lighthouse performance from 50-60 to 90+, achieving a 95+ SEO score, and reducing LCP to 1.5-2 seconds.
Shipped 12+ PRs across the application, marketing site, and APIs by contributing to a Next.js 16 and NestJS monorepo.
Reduced idea-to-draft time from days to minutes by building 30+ React components and implementing an LLM-powered streaming chat with live preview capabilities.
Accelerated product validation by developing a 6-tab AI research dashboard with 24+ reusable components, rendering structured LLM outputs for rapid go/no-go decisions.
Improved platform security and reliability by fixing 49+ bugs and eliminating 100% of SQL injection vulnerabilities through input whitelisting and query validation.
Enabled self-service customer onboarding and payments by launching a 6+ page server-rendered marketing website and integrating Stripe for subscription billing.
